zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.North Elmsall, Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Eng: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Rotherfield於大約1225年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親Sir Nichol de Rutherford23歲，母親Euphemia De Lisle27歲。他於1252年與Albreda Deincourt在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1293年在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh-hans.North Elmsall, Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Eng: 英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Rotherfield于大约1225年出生在苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲Sir Nichol de Rutherford23岁，母亲Euphemia De Lisle27岁。他于1252年与Albreda Deincourt在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1293年在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Rotherfield was born about 1225, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, was 23 and his mother, Euphemia De Lisle, was 27. He married Albreda Deincourt in 1252, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1293, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Rotherfield est né environ 1225, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Euphemia De Lisle, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Albreda Deincourt en 1252, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1293, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Rotherfield um 1225 in Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nichol de Rutherford 23 und seine Mutter Euphemia De Lisle 27. Er hat 1252 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England Albreda Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1293 im Alter von 70 Jahren in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Rotherfield è nato il circa 1225 nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Euphemia De Lisle, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Albreda Deincourt nel 1252, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1293, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Rotherfieldが約1225年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Nichol de Rutherfordは23歳，母Euphemia De Lisleは27歳であった。1252年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでAlbreda Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1293年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Rotherfield(이)가 대략 1225년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nichol de Rutherford(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia De Lisle(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1252년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Albreda Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1293년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1225–about 1293: tany ho any amin'ny 1225–tany ho any amin'ny 1293

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Rotherfield nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia De Lisle, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda Deincourt em 1252, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1293, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Rotherfield родился около 1225 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Nichol de Rutherford было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Euphemia De Lisle, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda Deincourt в 1252 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1293 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

sm.about 1225–about 1293: e tusa o le 1225–e tusa o le 1293

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Rotherfield nació aproximadamente 1225, en Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Nichol de Rutherford, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Euphemia De Lisle, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Albreda Deincourt en 1252, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1293, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
